arguments.argument: //post message if (keyboard_check_pressed(ord(global.ctrlUp)) or keyboard_check_pressed(vk_up)) and global.gamePaused=false { global.recBinariesRead+=1 with oMessageSign instance_destroy() messageWidth=string_width(stringToShow) newMessage=instance_create(256-(messageWidth/2),48,oMessageInfoSpot) newMessage.message=stringToShow newMessage.talker=talker newMessage.window=window newMessage.fadingTime=(string_length(stringToShow)*1.5)+10 }
